##Figure 2A

library(ggplot2)
library(data.table)
library(stringr)
library(dplyr)
library(lubridate)
library(tidyr)
library(rprojroot)
library(vegan)
library(wesanderson)
library(cowplot)
library(ggpubr)
library(rstatix)

virome_table=sprintf("WES-Data.txt")
metadata_table=sprintf("WES-MetaData.txt")
virome_dt <- fread(virome_table, sep = "\t", header = T )
meta_dt <- fread(metadata_table, sep = "\t", header = T )
seqname_sID_wide_dt <- 
  virome_dt %>% 
  subset(select = c("sequence_name", "sample_ID", "RPKMF")) %>%
  distinct(sequence_name, sample_ID, RPKMF) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = sequence_name, values_from = RPKMF, values_fill = 0)

sampleID_l <- seqname_sID_wide_dt$sample_ID

seqname_sID_wide_dt <- seqname_sID_wide_dt %>%
                          subset(select = -sample_ID)


bray_curtis_dist <- vegdist(seqname_sID_wide_dt, method="bray")
bray_curtis_mat <- as.matrix(bray_curtis_dist)
bray_curtis_df <- as.data.frame(bray_curtis_mat)
colnames(bray_curtis_df) <- sampleID_l
rownames(bray_curtis_df) <- sampleID_l
bray_curtis_df$sampleID1 <- rownames(bray_curtis_df)
melt_long <- melt(setDT(bray_curtis_df), 
                  id.vars = c("sampleID1"), variable.name = "sampleID2")
meta_long <- merge(melt_long, meta_dt, 
                   by.x = "sampleID1", by.y = "sample_ID", 
                   all.x = T, suffixes = c("", ".1"))
meta_long <- merge(meta_long, meta_dt, 
                   by.x = "sampleID2", by.y = "sample_ID", 
                   all.x = T, suffixes = c(".1", ".2"))
meta_long$Date.1 <- as.Date(meta_long$Date.1, , "%d-%m-%Y")
meta_long$Date.2 <- as.Date(meta_long$Date.2, , "%d-%m-%Y")
same_site_bray_dt <- meta_long %>% 
  filter(sampleID1 != sampleID2) %>%
  filter(Site.1 == Site.2)

same_site_bray_dt$time_passed <- 
  difftime(same_site_bray_dt$Date.1, 
           same_site_bray_dt$Date.2, units = "days") %>% 
  gsub(" days", "", .)

same_site_bray_dt$time_passed <- as.numeric(same_site_bray_dt$time_passed)
same_site_bray_dt <- same_site_bray_dt %>% 
  filter(time_passed >= 1)

uniqueN(same_site_bray_dt$Site.1)

same_site_bray_dt$City_Site <- str_c(
  same_site_bray_dt$City, ", ", same_site_bray_dt$Site)
same_site_bray_dt$City_Site <- str_c(
  same_site_bray_dt$City.1, ", ", same_site_bray_dt$Site.1)


site_palette_gra <- c("#004d6a", "#004d7a", "#008793", "#00bf72", "#a8eb12", "#d16ba5", "#ba83ca", "#9a9ae1", "#79b3f4", "#52cffe", 
                  "#3c1c4b", "#672f61", "#aa5579", "#f1aa75", "#f8dd91", 
                  "#02187c", "#0243a4", "#144ddf", "#1d85ee",  "#3bcebb",
                  "#fcdb32", "#fba10a", "#f24240", "#9a0e14")

same_site_bray_dt %>%
  mutate(City_Site = str_c(City.1, ", ", Site.1)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=time_passed, y=value, color=City_Site)) +
  geom_point(alpha=0.4, size = 1.5, stroke = 0) +
  geom_smooth(method = "loess", se = FALSE, color = "black") +
  scale_color_manual(values = site_palette_gra) +
  facet_wrap(vars(City.1, Site.1)) +
  labs(x = "Days Between Sampling", y = "Bray-Curtis Dissimilarity") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust=1, size = 13), text = element_text(colour = "black", size = 13), axis.title.y = element_text(size = 13, colour = "black"), axis.text = element_text(size = 12, colour = "black"),
        legend.position = "Off", strip.text = element_text(color = "black", size = 13), strip.background = element_rect(color="black", fill="#e5e5e5", size=0.5, linetype="solid")) 
				  

all_nonself_bray_dt <- meta_long %>% 
  filter(sampleID1 != sampleID2)

all_nonself_bray_dt$time_passed <- difftime(
  all_nonself_bray_dt$Date.1, all_nonself_bray_dt$Date.2, units = "days"
) %>% 
  gsub(" days", "", .) %>% gsub("-", "", .)
all_nonself_bray_dt$time_passed <- as.numeric(all_nonself_bray_dt$time_passed)


##Figure 2B

same_week_dt <- all_nonself_bray_dt %>%
   filter(time_passed <= 14) %>%
  mutate(site_compare = case_when(
    Site.1 == Site.2 ~ 'Intra-Site (Within Site)',
    Site.1 != Site.2 & City.1 == City.2 ~ 'Inter-Site (Within City)',
    City.1 != City.2 ~ 'Inter-City (Between City)',
    TRUE ~ 'idk'
  ))
  
library(ggpubr)
same_week_dt %>%
  mutate(City_Site = str_c(City.1, ", ", Site.1)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(factor(site_compare), value)) +
  geom_violin(aes(fill = factor(site_compare)), draw_quantiles = c(0.25, 0.5, 0.75), linetype = "dotted", scale = "width") +
  geom_violin(fill="transparent", draw_quantiles = c(0.5), scale = "width") +
  stat_compare_means(label = "p.signif", size = 6,
                     comparisons = 
                       list(c("Intra-Site (Within Site)", "Inter-Site (Within City)"), c("Intra-Site (Within Site)", "Inter-City (Between City)"),
                            c("Inter-Site (Within City)", "Inter-City (Between City)"))) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#778da9","#a49fd6","#f5dfbb")) +
  labs(y="Bray-Curtis Dissimilarity", x = "") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text( size = 12, colour = "black"),axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12, colour = "black"),panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "Off") + 
  theme_bw() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size = 13), text = element_text(colour = "black", size = 13), axis.title.y = element_text(size = 13, colour = "black"), axis.text = element_text(size = 12, colour = "black"),
        legend.position = "Off" ) 


##Figure 2C


library(ggplot2)
library(data.table)
library(stringr)
library(dplyr)
library(lubridate)
library(tidyr)
library(rprojroot)
library(Rtsne)
library(wesanderson)
library(cowplot)

virome_table=sprintf("WES-Data-DNA-Lib.txt")
metadata_table=sprintf("WES-MetaData-with-lib-for-tsne-DNA.txt")

virome_table=sprintf("WES-Data-RNA-Lib.txt")
metadata_table=sprintf("WES-MetaData-with-lib-for-tsne-RNA.txt")


virome_dt <- fread(virome_table, sep = "\t", header = T )
meta_dt <- fread(metadata_table, sep = "\t", header = T )

seqname_sID_wide_dt <- 
  virome_dt %>% 
  subset(select = c("sequence_name", "sample_ID", "RPKMF")) %>%
  distinct(sequence_name, sample_ID, RPKMF) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = sequence_name, values_from = RPKMF, values_fill = 0)

sampleID_l <- seqname_sID_wide_dt$sample_ID

seqname_sID_wide_dt <- seqname_sID_wide_dt %>% subset(select = -sample_ID)
tephi_prcomp1 <- prcomp(log10(seqname_sID_wide_dt+1))

emb <- Rtsne::Rtsne(tephi_prcomp1$x[,1:10])

embb <- emb$Y

rownames(embb) <- sampleID_l

embb_df <- as.data.frame(embb)

embb_dt <- setDT(embb_df, keep.rownames = "sample_ID")

embb_dt <- merge(embb_dt, meta_dt, by ="sample_ID")

embb_dt$City_Site <- str_c(embb_dt$City, ", ", embb_dt$Site)

embb_dt$Date <- as.Date(embb_dt$Date, , "%d-%m-%Y")

city_tsnep <- embb_dt %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = V1, y = V2, color = City, shape = City)) +
  geom_point(size = 3, alpha = 0.8) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c(
    "Ahmedabad" = "#0070c0",
    "Gandhinagar" = "#da3030",
    "Vadodara" = "#354e68",
    "Rajkot" = "#ffa700"
  )) +  #  +  scale_color_manual(values = c("DNA" = "#0f8b8d", "RNA" = "#a8201a"))
  theme_bw() +
  labs(x = "tSNE-1", y = "tSNE-2", color = "City", shape = "City") + 
  theme(legend.text = element_text(size = 12),  legend.key.size = unit(0.5, "cm"), legend.title = element_text(size = 12, colour = "black"),
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90,hjust=1,colour = "black", size = 12), axis.text = element_text(colour = "black", size = 12), axis.text.y = element_text(size = 13), axis.title.y = element_text(size = 13, color = "black"),
        panel.grid.major.x = element_blank()) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size = 13, colour = "black"),  axis.title.x = element_text(size = 13, color =  "black"))


city_tsnep

as.Date_origin <- function(x){
  as.Date(x, origin = '1970-01-01')
}

date_tsnep <- embb_dt %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=V1, y=V2, color=as.integer(Date), shape = City)) +
  geom_point(size = 3, alpha = 0.8) +
  scale_color_gradient(low = "#282359",
                       high = "#f59843", labels=as.Date_origin, name = "Date") +       #low = #282359, high = #d12e27
  theme_bw() +
  labs(x="tSNE-1", y="tSNE-2") + 
  theme(legend.text = element_text(size = 12),  legend.key.size = unit(0.5, "cm"), legend.title = element_text(size = 12, colour = "black"),
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90,hjust=1,colour = "black", size = 12), axis.text = element_text(colour = "black", size = 12), axis.text.y = element_text(size = 13), axis.title.y = element_text(size = 13, color = "black"),
        panel.grid.major.x = element_blank()) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size = 13, colour = "black"),  axis.title.x = element_text(size = 13, color =  "black"))


date_tsnep


##Figure S1

virome_dt <- fread("WES-Data.txt", sep = "\t", header = TRUE)
meta_dt <- fread("WES-MetaData-with-lib-for-tsne.txt", sep = "\t", header = TRUE)

seqname_sID_wide_dt <- 
  virome_dt %>% 
  subset(select = c("sequence_name", "sample_ID", "RPKMF")) %>%
  distinct(sequence_name, sample_ID, RPKMF) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = sequence_name, values_from = RPKMF, values_fill = 0)

sampleID_l <- seqname_sID_wide_dt$sample_ID

seqname_sID_wide_dt <- seqname_sID_wide_dt %>% subset(select = -sample_ID)
tephi_prcomp1 <- prcomp(log10(seqname_sID_wide_dt+1))

emb <- Rtsne::Rtsne(tephi_prcomp1$x[,1:10])

embb <- emb$Y

rownames(embb) <- sampleID_l

embb_df <- as.data.frame(embb)

embb_dt <- setDT(embb_df, keep.rownames = "sample_ID")

embb_dt <- merge(embb_dt, meta_dt, by ="sample_ID")

embb_dt$City_Site <- str_c(embb_dt$City, ", ", embb_dt$Site)

embb_dt$Date <- as.Date(embb_dt$Date, , "%d-%m-%Y")

city_tsnep <- embb_dt %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = V1, y = V2, color = Library, shape = City)) +
  geom_point(size = 3, alpha = 0.8) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("DNA" = "#f9742f", "RNA" = "#530f68")) + 
  theme_bw() +
  labs(x = "tSNE-1", y = "tSNE-2", color = "Library Type", shape = "City") + 
  theme(legend.text = element_text(size = 12),  legend.key.size = unit(0.5, "cm"), legend.title = element_text(size = 12, colour = "black"),
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90,hjust=1,colour = "black", size = 12), axis.text = element_text(colour = "black", size = 12), axis.text.y = element_text(size = 13), axis.title.y = element_text(size = 13, color = "black"),
        panel.grid.major.x = element_blank()) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size = 13, colour = "black"),  axis.title.x = element_text(size = 13, color =  "black"))


city_tsnep

as.Date_origin <- function(x){
  as.Date(x, origin = '1970-01-01')
}


date_tsnep <- embb_dt %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=V1, y=V2, color=as.integer(Date), shape = City)) +
  geom_point(size = 3, alpha = 0.8) +
  scale_color_gradient(low = "#282359",
                       high = "#f59843", labels=as.Date_origin, name = "Date") +       #low = #282359, high = #d12e27
  theme_bw() +
  labs(x="tSNE-1", y="tSNE-2") + 
  theme(legend.text = element_text(size = 12),  legend.key.size = unit(0.5, "cm"), legend.title = element_text(size = 12, colour = "black"),
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90,hjust=1,colour = "black", size = 12), axis.text = element_text(colour = "black", size = 12), axis.text.y = element_text(size = 13), axis.title.y = element_text(size = 13, color = "black"),
        panel.grid.major.x = element_blank()) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size = 13, colour = "black"),  axis.title.x = element_text(size = 13, color =  "black"))


date_tsnep


##Figure 2D

virome_met_dt <- merge(virome_dt, meta_dt, by = "sample_ID")

virome_met_dt$City_Site <- str_c(virome_met_dt$City, ", ", virome_met_dt$Site)

city_prev_dt <- virome_met_dt %>%
  group_by(City) %>%
  mutate(total_samples = n_distinct(sample_ID)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  group_by(strain, City, total_samples) %>%
  summarize(n = n_distinct(sample_ID)) %>%
  mutate(freq = n / total_samples) %>%
  select(strain, City, freq) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = City, values_from = freq, values_fill = 0)

tax_table <- virome_dt %>%
  select(kingdom, phylum, class, order, family, genus, species, strain) %>%
  distinct()

city_prev_tax_dt <- merge(city_prev_dt, tax_table, by = "strain")

city_long <- city_prev_tax_dt %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(Ahmedabad, Gandhinagar, Rajkot, Vadodara),
               names_to = "City", values_to = "Prevalence")
			   
			   
avg_prev <- city_long %>%
  group_by(family, City) %>%
  summarize(mean_prev = mean(Prevalence, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")


  ggplot(avg_prev, aes(x = reorder(family, +mean_prev), y = mean_prev, color = City)) +
    geom_segment(aes(xend = family, y = 0, yend = mean_prev),
                 position = position_dodge(width = 0.8),
                 color = "gray50") +
    geom_point(position = position_dodge(width = 0.8), size = 3) +
    coord_flip() +
    scale_color_manual(values = c(
      "Ahmedabad" = "#0070c0",
      "Gandhinagar" = "#da3030",
      "Vadodara" = "#354e68",
      "Rajkot" = "#ffa700"
    )) +
    labs( y = "Mean Prevalence" , x = "Family") +
    theme_bw(base_size = 13) +
    theme(
      axis.title.x = element_blank(),
      axis.text.x = element_text(size = 12, color = "black"),
      axis.text.y = element_text(size = 11, color = "black"),
      legend.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
      legend.text = element_text(size = 13),
      plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5)
    )

##Figure 2E

virome_table=sprintf("WES-Data.txt")
metadata_table=sprintf("WES-MetaData-with-Season - Copy.txt")

virome_dt <- fread(virome_table, sep = "\t", header = T )
meta_dt <- fread(metadata_table, sep = "\t", header = T )

seqname_sID_wide_dt <- 
  virome_dt %>% 
  subset(select = c("sequence_name", "sample_ID", "RPKMF")) %>%
  distinct(sequence_name, sample_ID, RPKMF) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = sequence_name, values_from = RPKMF, values_fill = 0)

sampleID_l <- seqname_sID_wide_dt$sample_ID

seqname_sID_wide_dt <- seqname_sID_wide_dt %>% subset(select = -sample_ID)
shannon_d <- vegan::diversity(seqname_sID_wide_dt, index = "shannon")

sample_diversity <- cbind(sampleID_l, shannon_d)
sample_diversity <- as.data.frame(sample_diversity)
setDT(sample_diversity)

sample_diversity_meta <- merge(sample_diversity, meta_dt, by.x = "sampleID_l", by.y = "sample_ID")

sample_diversity_meta$City_Site <- str_c(sample_diversity_meta$City, ", ", sample_diversity_meta$Site)

sample_diversity_meta$Date <- as.Date(sample_diversity_meta$Date, , "%d-%m-%Y")

sample_diversity_meta$shannon_d <- as.numeric(sample_diversity_meta$shannon_d)

hist(sample_diversity_meta$shannon_d)

library(lme4)
library(lmerTest)

sample_diversity_meta$Site <- as.character(sample_diversity_meta$Site)
sample_diversity_meta$Meteorological_Season <- as.character(sample_diversity_meta$Meteorological_Season)

Month_year_order <- c("Sep-23","Oct-23","Nov-23","Dec-23","Jan-24","Feb-24","Mar-24","Apr-24","May-24","Jun-24","Jul-24", "Aug-24", "Sep-24")
sample_diversity_meta$Month_Year <- factor(sample_diversity_meta$Month_Year, levels = Month_year_order)
week_year_order <- c("36_2023", "38_2023", "40_2023", "42_2023", "44_2023", "45_2023", "47_2023", "49_2023", "51_2023", "52_2023", "1_2024", "3_2024", "6_2024", "7_2024", "8_2024", "9_2024", "10_2024", "11_2024", "12_2024", "13_2024", "14_2024", "15_2024", "16_2024", "17_2024", "19_2024", "20_2024", "21_2024", "22_2024", "23_2024", "24_2024", "25_2024", "26_2024", "27_2024", "28_2024", "29_2024", "32_2024", "33_2024", "34_2024", "36_2024", "37_2024", "38_2024", "39_2024")
sample_diversity_meta$Week_Year <- factor(sample_diversity_meta$Week_Year, levels = week_year_order)
  
 
set.seed(123)
  model1 <- lmer(shannon_d ~ Meteorological_Season + Month_Year + (1 | City_Site), data = sample_diversity_meta, REML = FALSE)
  model1
  set.seed(123)
  model1 %>% anova()
  

set.seed(123)
  model2 <- lmer(shannon_d ~ Meteorological_Season + Week_Year + (1 | City_Site), data = sample_diversity_meta, REML = FALSE)
  model2
  set.seed(123)
  model2 %>% anova()
  
  
library(ggplot2)

sample_diversity_meta$Meteorological_Season <- factor(
      sample_diversity_meta$Meteorological_Season,
      levels = c("Monsoon 2023", "Winter 2023-2024", "Summer 2024", "Monsoon 2024")
    )
    
    
sample_diversity_meta$Meteorological_Season <- factor(
      sample_diversity_meta$Meteorological_Season,
      levels = c("Monsoon 2023", "Post Monsoon 2023","Winter 2023-2024", "Summer 2024", "Monsoon 2024")
    )
	

ggplot(sample_diversity_meta, aes(x = Month_Year, y = shannon_d, group = Meteorological_Season)) +
      geom_point(aes(fill = Meteorological_Season), 
                 color = "black", shape = 21, size = 2, stroke = 0.5) +
      geom_smooth(method = "loess", se = TRUE, span = 0.5, level = 0.95, 
                  size = 1, linetype = "solid", colour = "black") +
      scale_fill_manual(
        values = c(
          "Monsoon 2023" = "#f0d77b",
          "Winter 2023-2024" = "#67b9e9",
          "Summer 2024" = "#cd4f38",
          "Monsoon 2024" = "#58a449"
        )
      ) +
      theme_bw() +
      labs(
        x = "Month of the Year",
        y = "Alpha Diversity",
        title = "Alpha Diversity by Seasons"
      ) +
      theme(
        legend.position = "top",
        legend.title = element_blank(),
        axis.title.x = element_text(size = 13, colour = "black"),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size = 13, color = "black"),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 13),
        #legend.key.size = unit(1.5, 'cm'),  # increase size
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 1, hjust = 1, size = 11, color = "black"),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 13, color = "black"),
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 14),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.background = element_blank()
      )

  
##Figure 2F

week_labels <- setNames(sub("_.*", "", unique(sample_diversity_meta$Week_Year)),
                            unique(sample_diversity_meta$Week_Year))
    ggplot(sample_diversity_meta, aes(x = Week_Year, y = shannon_d, group = Meteorological_Season)) +
      geom_point(aes(fill = Meteorological_Season), 
                 color = "black", shape = 21, size = 2, stroke = 0.5) +
      geom_smooth(method = "loess", se = TRUE, span = 0.5, level = 0.95, 
                  size = 1, linetype = "solid", colour = "black") +
      scale_fill_manual(
        values = c(
          "Monsoon 2023" = "#f0d77b",
          "Winter 2023-2024" = "#67b9e9",
          "Summer 2024" = "#cd4f38",
          "Monsoon 2024" = "#58a449"
        )
      ) +
       scale_x_discrete(
        labels = function(x) sub("_.*", "", x)  
      ) +
      theme_bw() +
      labs(
        x = "",
        y = "Alpha Diversity",
        title = "Alpha Diversity by Seasons"
      ) +
      theme(
        legend.position = "top",
        legend.title = element_blank(),
        axis.title.x = element_text(size = 13, colour = "black"),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size = 13, color = "black"),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 13),
        #legend.key.size = unit(1.5, 'cm'),  # increase size
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 1, hjust = 1, size = 10, color = "black"),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 13, color = "black"),
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 14),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.background = element_blank()
      )


##Figure 2G

library(tidyverse)

library(ggplot2)
library(ggalluvial)
library(cowplot)


df_long <- df %>%
  pivot_longer(-Family, names_to = "Season", values_to = "Relative_Abundance")


df_long$Season <- factor(df_long$Season, levels = c("Monsoon 2023", "Winter 2023-2024", "Summer 2024", "Monsoon 2024"))

library(ggalluvial)


my_colors <- c(
  "#8EC9D0", "#A8C686", "#E9C46A", "#F08080", "#A9A9A9",
  "#B5896D", "#905D9C", "#4A90A4", "#F4A261", "#E49AB0",
  "#C86A51", "#9DD6C6", "#B84A4A", "#B3CBE3", "#91B57B",
  "#EDE0CF", "#D6AEDD"
)

df_long$Season <- factor(df_long$Season, levels = c(
  "Monsoon 2023", "Winter 2023-2024", "Summer 2024", "Monsoon 2024"
))

ggplot(df_long, aes(y = Relative_Abundance, x = Season, fill = Family)) +
  geom_flow(aes(alluvium = Family), color = "black", alpha = 0.4, curve_type = "sine", width = 0.3) +
  geom_col(width = 0.3, color = "black", size = 0.1) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = my_colors) +
  scale_y_continuous(name = "Relative Abundance", expand = c(0, 0)) +
  cowplot::theme_minimal_hgrid(font_size = 12) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold"),
    axis.title.x = element_blank(),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 11),
    legend.title = element_blank(),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 10),
    legend.position = "bottom", legend.justification = "center",
    legend.box = "bottom"
  )
